== Notes for [[Item:Q111973|Q111973]] ==

Teresa Ramírez de León1

b. circa 926?

Father Ramiro II "el Feroz Guerrero", rey de León b. circa 913, d. 1 January 951

Mother Adosinda Gutiérrez b. circa 902

Teresa Ramírez de León was born circa 926?. She was the daughter of Ramiro II "el Feroz Guerrero", rey de León and Adosinda Gutiérrez. Teresa Ramírez de León married García II Sánchez, rey de Navarra, son of Sancho I Garcés, rey de Pamplona and Toda Aznárez de Larraun, in 943; His 2nd.1

Family

García II Sánchez, rey de Navarra b. between 919 and 921, d. 970

Child

Urraca Garcés de Navarra+ b. c 944?

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 292-39.

García Sánchez I of Pamplona

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

García was succeeded by his son Sancho II Garcés, nicknamed Abarca. He also created a novel kingdom centered at Viguera for his son by Teresa, Ramiro Garcés. By her he also had a daughter, Urraca, married firstly Fernán González of Castile and secondly William II Sánchez of Gascony.

Reina de Aragón
2ª señora de Don García III Sánchez, rey de Navarra

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11010

Countess de Aragon

Reina de Aragón
2ª señora de Don García III Sánchez, rey de Navarra

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
